message:
refactor: extract ManageCardsTab subcomponent from CardFactoryModal.tsx (#8608) [part 7] (#8912)

Move the 'Manage' tab JSX block (~45 LOC of empty state + saved card
list with delete affordance) into a new presentational component
`ManageCardsTab` in `cardFactoryManageTab.tsx`.

Pure extraction — zero behavior change. The component takes
`existingCards` and `onDeleteRequest` props; the parent retains
ownership of delete confirmation state and actual deletion.

Also drops now-unused imports from CardFactoryModal.tsx:
- `Trash2` (was only used in the extracted block; the lingering
  reference at line 536 is inside a T2_TEMPLATES template literal,
  not a real JSX usage).
- `wrapAbbreviations` (only used in the extracted block).

Verification:
- `npx tsc --noEmit` — zero errors
- `npx eslint` on touched files — no new errors
- CardFactoryModal.test.tsx + AddCardModal tests + CardCatalogSection
  test — all pass (28/28)
- `npm run build` — passes

CFM line count: 1232 -> 1196.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
